title: eupatorium solidaginoides var. typicum
intro: Eupatorium solidaginoides var. typicum, also known as Gravel Root or Solidago Gravel Root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Eupatorium genus and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Eupatorium solidaginoides var. typicum include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other renal issues, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Eupatorium solidaginoides var. typicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its purported benefits.
